bank_status: SEALED — 50 questions, 6 categories. Re-sealed at K471 against r11_canonical_corpus.md (corpus ID R11-CANONICAL-K444-v2). Replaces K444 legacy bank (R11-CANONICAL-K444). DO NOT edit questions or hot_required_elements after this seal commit without bumping bank_version and Bishop ratification.
sealed_by: Knight K471 automated seal — Founder-approved per B121 dispatch authorization
realignment_note: K444 bank (R11-CANONICAL-K444) referenced an earlier version of the corpus than what was ingested into Cathedrals at K455c/K455a/K470. Only 8/50 questions from the K444 bank (CS-01 through CS-08) were answerable from the current corpus, bounding K455a/K455c/K455b absolute HOT% at ~16-22%. This K471 bank re-seals all 50 questions against r11_canonical_corpus.md (R11-CANONICAL-K444-v2) to restore a 100% answerable ceiling.
target_test: R11 Cross-Vendor Memory Benchmark — verification 2-arm (K471) and subsequent full re-runs
grading_rubric: R10 three-tier (HOT / HIT / MISS) — substring matching against hot_required_elements. HOT = all required elements present (case-insensitive substring). HIT = >= ceil(n/2) elements present, at least 1. MISS = fewer than half. Retrieval-correct sub-metric: HOT that is MISS in the cold_haiku baseline = retrieval-correct. HOT that is also HOT in cold_haiku = prior-knowledge-correct.
alignment_guarantee: Every question's hot_required_elements are verified exact substrings of r11_canonical_corpus.md at seal time. Theoretical HOT ceiling = 100% (50/50). Any condition scoring below 30% HOT with Cathedral loaded indicates retrieval failure, not question-bank mismatch.

questions.question: How many active member-owners did the Verdania Cooperative Platform report as of Q3 2025?
questions.ground_truth: 847,293 active member-owners as of Q3 2025.
questions.canonical_answer: 847,293 active member-owners as of Q3 2025.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may invent a plausible member count

rubric.correct: Response contains '847,293' and 'Q3 2025' or equivalent date reference
rubric.partial: Response contains the correct member count or the correct quarter but not both
rubric.incorrect: Response does not contain the correct member count

questions.question: What total transaction volume did the Verdania Cooperative Platform report for fiscal year 2024?
questions.ground_truth: $4.7 billion in fiscal year 2024.
questions.canonical_answer: $4.7 billion in fiscal year 2024.
questions.hallucination_risk: high — model may invent a plausible volume figure

rubric.partial: Response mentions the scale (billions) but gets the exact figure wrong

questions.question: What vote threshold does the Cooperative Ledger Standards Body require for constitutional amendments in federated cooperative networks?
questions.ground_truth: 66.7% of eligible votes.
questions.canonical_answer: 66.7% of eligible votes for any constitutional amendment.

rubric.partial: Response says two-thirds or 67% without the canonical 66.7% value
rubric.incorrect: Response gives a wrong threshold or does not answer

questions.question: Under the Cooperative AI Governance Charter, how frequently must AI models in member-facing roles undergo comprehensive third-party audits for renewal certification?

questions.ground_truth: February 12, 2021; adopted by 91% of Standards Body member platforms within its first year.
questions.canonical_answer: formally adopted on February 12, 2021; adopted by 91% of Standards Body member platforms within its first year.
